JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown below the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's multiplier to x4.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_5_Payout3_5: Any win in the fourth round will increase the fifth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: Starting with the multipliers of x1, x2 x3, x4 and x5, all multipliers will be increased by 1 at the end of every free spin.
JurassicKingdomPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: At the end of every free spin, 1 free spin is awarded for each +1 symbol on the reels (if any).

JurassicKingdomRule.Rule1_1: Jurassic Kingdom is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and increasing multiplier.
JurassicKingdomRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{64} ways - %{46656} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
JurassicKingdomRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
